stickerText:
my PERFECT morning
routine before school

gets my body moving
fluid, helps debloating

healthy fibres
some good energy
not starting day with slop

follow up with some
dbloat and uglow

if u don’t shower before
school u musty 💔

if u don’t cleanse in 
the morning this is 
a need

gotta nourish your
skin in the morning

-removes puffiness 
-hides dark circles
-makes you look awake

-adds moisture 
-gives waves some hold
-doesn’t dry them out

get that scrunched in
the mids and ends

locks in moisture 
to keep waves popping

focus on areas where
u have redness, eyebags ect

do NOT neglect these
areas bru

now finishing up
with eyelashes and brows

contents.desc: best morning routine to start your day
